context: A pivotal moment in this 3rd place final match. Croatia lead Morocco 2-1. The game hangs in the balance — every decision from the touchline could decide the outcome.

options.label: A
options.action: Defensive substitution — bring on a fresh center-back, sit deep

options.label: B

real_decision.description: Croatia won 2-1. Joško Gvardiol (6'), Achraf Dari (8'), Mislav Oršić (41').
